positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a soaring cosmic manta ray and a whimsical, deep-sea bioluminescent flora, rendered in clean silhouette style. The composition is centered and symmetrical, emphasizing the elegant flow of the creature's fins and the abstract, organic shapes of the surrounding glowing plant life. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, ethereal cyan, and subtle neon violet against a charcoal background. The overall aesthetic should evoke a sense of calm wonder and cosmic adventure, designed with crisp lines and bold negative space suitable for screen printing on apparel. Highly detailed, vectorial illustration, geometric pop art style.
negative: photo, realistic, grainy, blur, text, watermark, low resolution, artifact, dirty, ugly, excessive detail, busy composition, noise, bad anatomy, missing limbs
